blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auto-maintenance trigger functionality.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an auto-maintenance trigger, specifically stating that maintenance should be scheduled after 40 hours of use. However, the linked use case only mentions that Machine A auto-schedules maintenance every 100 scans or 40 hours of use without providing evidence of the actual implementation of this trigger. The absence of concrete evidence confirming the existence and functionality of the auto-maintenance trigger indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the auto-maintenance trigger after 40 hours of use.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auto-maintenance trigger functionality.
